name: com.kidzdev.unity.profanity
description: Production-grade multilingual profanity filter. Obfuscation-aware engine (leetspeak, separators, repeat-collapse), allowlist for false-positive prevention, plug-in data loader (Resources default, optional Addressables adapter). Supports English and Thai out of the box.

samples.description: Ready-to-run scene: EN+TH word lists loaded from Resources, live censor input field, allowlist demonstration.
IProfanityDataLoader backed by Unity Addressables — load word-list JSON from remote with label 'profanity'.
